description: The 'InsectSprays.csv' dataset is open in Jamovi, containing insect counts for six spray types (A-F). Compare Spray 'C' against Spray 'F' by setting 'F' as the reference level and performing an ANOVA with simple contrasts. Save the project as '~/Documents/Jamovi/Spray_Contrasts.omv' and record the resulting t-statistic for the C vs F comparison in '~/Documents/Jamovi/contrast_report.txt'.
